title: oreogrammitis inconstans
intro: Oreogrammitis inconstans is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the fern family. It is a type of epiphytic fern that is native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Oreogrammitis inconstans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reduced fever, improved digestion, and relief from respiratory issues.
